emails.subject: Vacation
emails.body: Vacation BH, I plan to be on vacation July 5-6 (finally) and on the customer trip on the 7th. While I am out, Gary Hanks will be keeping our position during trading. Stacey will be in charge of everything else. I am comfortable that everything will be covered. I will be back in town Thursday night. The primary flight for the customer trip leaves around 11:30. Others leave at 3:30 and 5:30(?). The latest idea we had is that Pat would take a later flight on this trip and I will take a later flight on the August trip, allowing one of us to be in the office for half the day. I can also come in for the half day on the 7th if we decide that is needed. D

emails.subject: Re: Vacation
emails.body: Re: Vacation i will leave the choice to you all. We just need to make sure there is coverage. Have a good one! Daren J Farmer 06/22/2000 08:00 AM
